channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Agents Lie to Each Other — Unless You Put a Translator in the Middle
item.description: Here's a failure mode nobody warns you about. Your crash tracker identifies a regression. Solid analysis, reasonable conclusions, 72% confidence. You forward the findings to the telemetry...

item.description: Caching in Next.js has always been powerful. But since the App Router, it has also become deeply layered, sometimes confusing, and — if you get it wrong — quietly responsible for stale data,...

item.title: The hidden cost of alignment without ownership
item.description: Alignment feels productive. Everyone agrees. The room nods. The slide says “consensus.” The meeting ends on time. And then execution slows down. Alignment without ownership is one of the most...

item.title: What features do people actually want in a QR code generator?
item.description: I'm curious what features people actually use when generating QR codes. For example: • color customization • logo in the center • transparent background • SVG export • batch generation Are there...

item.title: I Gave an AI My Study Materials and It Planned My Entire Learning Schedule — HyperKnow Is Not Just Another Chatbot
item.description: "What if your AI study partner didn't wait for you to ask — but already knew what you needed to learn next?" That question kept bugging me after the 100th time I opened ChatGPT, typed "explain...

item.title: I Built a Free Website With 60+ Online Tools (Calculators, QR Generator, Dev Tools)

item.title: I built an MCP server that lets Claude watermark images - here's how

item.title: Building CommonTrace: A Neuroscience-Inspired Knowledge Base for AI Coding Agents

item.description: AI tools like Claude Code have made it possible for users to build software with no coding knowledge whatsoever. That's not to say the process is easy, though: You may not need to write code...

item.title: Manipulating AI Summarization Features
item.description: Microsoft is reporting: Companies are embedding hidden instructions in “Summarize with AI” buttons that, when clicked, attempt to inject persistence commands into an AI assistant’s memory via URL...

item.title: Who needs data centers in space when they can float offshore?
item.description: Offshore wind developer Aikido will deploy a small data center beneath a floating offshore wind turbine later this year.

item.description: Does anyone really need a remote for a device you’re already either holding or using at arm’s length? E-readers have saved us from the risk of paper cuts and the burden of physically turning...

item.title: Inside the secret meeting that led to the AI political resistance

item.title: Fake Laravel Packages on Packagist Deploy RAT on Windows, macOS, and Linux
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged malicious Packagist PHP packages masquerading as Laravel utilities that act as a conduit for a cross-platform remote access trojan (RAT) that's functional on...

item.title: Activision silences trusted Call of Duty leaker

item.title: CISA Adds Actively Exploited VMware Aria Operations Flaw CVE-2026-22719 to KEV Catalog
item.description: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) on Tuesday added a recently disclosed security flaw impacting Broadcom VMware Aria Operations to its Known Exploited...

item.title: Why AI startups are selling the same equity at two different prices
item.description: Some AI founders are using a novel valuation mechanism to manufacture unicorn status.

item.title: Anker’s last-gen sleep buds are nearly 40 percent off ahead of daylight saving time
item.description: Bad news: most Americans are about to lose an hour of sleep next week. Good news: if you have trouble falling (or staying asleep), Newegg is currently selling Anker’s Soundcore Sleep A20 earbuds...

item.title: Does Ticketmaster have a stranglehold on concert ticketing — or is it just ‘bringing joy’?

item.title: Alibaba’s Qwen tech lead steps down after major AI push
item.description: Reactions rippled through Alibaba's Qwen team after tech lead Junyang Lin stepped down following a major model launch.

item.title: Downdetector, Speedtest sold to IT service provider Accenture in $1.2B deal
item.description: Accenture plans to buy Ookla, which also includes RootMetrics and Ekahau.

item.title: AI companies are spending millions to thwart this former tech exec’s congressional bid
item.description: A tech billionaire-backed super PAC is spending $125 million to undercut candidates pushing for AI regulation. New York's Alex Bores, a former tech executive himself, is one of them.

item.title: What Trump’s war on Iran means for the US energy crunch
item.description: Fuel prices surged after the Trump administration launched strikes against Iran on Saturday, immediately raising questions about whether the war would increase energy costs for Americans, put more...

item.title: The best AirPods deals you can get right now
